CustomField.formula:
IF( DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) >= DATE(2025, 8, 07), CASE(Vendor_Name__c, "AGP - A0W4", 60, "HAL - H0G2", 45, "Geze-G0B2", 50, "Dorset-D786", 50, "FGPLTD-F0A1", 50, "IFSL - I0H7", 55, "KORI - K0H1", 55, "KICH-K3A7", 50, "Ahlada - A611", 50, "GMP - G325", 50, "TSPL - T486", 50, "SEPL - SK79", 50, "NCL - N3B3", 50, "Bhawani - BN39", 50, "Iclean - I333", 50, "SagarAsia - SMLO", 0, "NCL-N3B3-OR", 50, "G325-MAH", 50, "KRUTI - K3E0", 35, "ULT - U0A3", 45, "Iclean - I333TG", 50, "Component-C0D9", 50, "PFCPLTD - P0J6", 70, "GWS - G0G7", 55, 0 ), IF( DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) >= DATE(2025, 7, 9), CASE(Vendor_Name__c, "Geze-G0B2", 50, "Dorset-D786", 50, "KORI - K0H1", 55, "IFSL - I0H7", 55, "KICH-K3A7", 50, "Ahlada - A611", 50, "GMP - G325", 50, "TSPL - T486", 50, "SEPL - SK79", 50, "NCL - N3B3", 50, "Bhawani - BN39", 50, "Iclean - I333", 50, "SagarAsia - SMLO", 0, "NCL-N3B3-OR", 50, "G325-MAH", 50, "KRUTI - K3E0", 35, "ULT - U0A3", 45, "Iclean - I333TG", 50, "Component-C0D9", 50, "PFCPLTD - P0J6", 55, "GWS - G0G7", 55, 0 ),
IF( DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) >= DATE(2025, 2, 14), CASE(Vendor_Name__c, "Geze-G0B2", 50, "Dorset-D786", 50, CASE(Vendor_Name__c, "Ahlada - A611", 50, "GMP - G325", 50, "TSPL - T486", 50, "SEPL - SK79", 50, "NCL - N3B3", 50, "Bhawani - BN39", 50, "Iclean - I333", 50, "SagarAsia - SMLO", 0, "NCL-N3B3-OR", 50, "G325-MAH", 50, "KRUTI - K3E0", 35, "ULT - U0A3", 45, "Iclean - I333TG", 50, "Component-C0D9", 50, "PFCPLTD - P0J6", 55, "GWS - G0G7", 55, 0 ) ), CASE(Vendor_Name__c, "Ahlada - A611", 50, "GMP - G325", 50, "TSPL - T486", 50, "SEPL - SK79", 50, "NCL - N3B3", 50, "Bhawani - BN39", 50, "Iclean - I333", 50, "SagarAsia - SMLO", 0, "NCL-N3B3-OR", 50, "G325-MAH", 50, "KRUTI - K3E0", 35, "ULT - U0A3", 45, "Iclean - I333TG", 50, "Component-C0D9", 50, "PFCPLTD - P0J6", 55, "GWS - G0G7", 55, 0 ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: B2B CPDD Days
